name: text-extractor
description: Extracts a document's (docx/pptx/xlsx/odt/odp/ods/pdf/rtf/csv/md/html) content as safe, minimal, semantic, text-only HTML: headings, bold/italic, lists, blockquotes, code, and bare GFM tables. No images. No article extraction. No filesystem access — takes bytes in, returns { html, error } out.
